analysis.reasoning: Core message: A celebratory note about the US Independence Day event with allies (ROK), honoring American principles of freedom and liberty, with well-wishes to Americans. Evaluation by narrative: US1 (honorable tradition) – Yes; it explicitly honors foundational principles of freedom and liberty upon which the USA is founded, invoking historical legacy. US2 (admirable society) – No; it does not highlight specific social groups, civil society, companies, or military heroes (a band mention is incidental entertainment, not valorization). US3 (hostile enemies) – No; no adversaries mentioned. US4 (force for good) – No; it doesn’t claim US actions supporting global rights or oppressed peoples. US5 (great international ally) – Yes; mentions celebrating with ROK and “other friends,” highlighting allied relationships and camaraderie. US6 (at the forefront) – No; no leadership or superiority claims. Conclusion: US1 and US5 apply.
